body:
# Load My World PROPERLY

This mod watches the singleplayer client and, when the game gets stuck on the black screen after loading a world, it forces the game to continue so you can actually play. It does this automatically without any extra steps from you.

### What It Does (for the user)

- Detects when the game is stuck on the loading screen or when the world isn’t fully ready.
- After a short wait it clears the “skip render world” flag that keeps the screen frozen.
- Removes any loading screens such as “Downloading terrain” or “Working” so the world appears.
- Returns control to you so you can move, open inventory, and play normally.
- Works only in singleplayer worlds on the client; no server changes are needed.

### Features

- Runs automatically on the client side.
- Only activates in singleplayer sessions.
- Clears the stuck flag and reloads renderers when needed.
- Restores the player’s view and focus after the fix.
- No configuration or commands required.
- Small footprint, no extra items or blocks added.

### Why Use This Mod?

- Prevents being stuck on a black screen and having to restart the world.
- Lets you get back to playing quickly after a long load.
- Works silently in the background, no extra UI.
- Helpful for worlds that take a long time to load on older hardware.

## What You'll Notice

- Runs only on the client in singleplayer worlds.
- Waits for the world and player to be loaded before acting.
description: Hate getting stuck on the black screen after loading? This mod cancels that pain, you can actually play.
title: Load My World PROPERLY
